definitions.en: to try, to strive, to make an effort

example.en: I will try my best to complete the work.
example.es: Haré todo lo posible para completar el trabajo.
example.vi: Tôi sẽ cố gắng hết sức để hoàn thành công việc.

exampleSentencesTranslated: I will try to finish my homework before going to sleep.
He always try to help everyone around him.
She try very hard to pass this exam.

translation.en: I will try to learn Vietnamese.

notes_md:
**cố** = to try, to make an effort. It’s about pushing yourself to do something, even if it’s hard.

It’s a verb. You put it before another verb to show effort.  

It often implies effort over time or difficulty. Stronger and more natural version: **cố gắng** (very common).  

Opposite idea: **bỏ cuộc** (give up).
notes:
cố = to try, to make an effort. It’s about pushing yourself to do something, even if it’s hard.

It’s a verb. You put it before another verb to show effort.  

It often implies effort over time or difficulty. Stronger and more natural version: cố gắng (very common).  

Opposite idea: bỏ cuộc (give up).
exampleSentences: Em sẽ cố hoàn thành bài tập trước khi đi ngủ.
Anh luôn cố để giúp đỡ mọi người xung quanh.
Chị ấy đã cố rất nhiều để vượt qua kỳ thi này.

translation.en: I will try to learn Vietnamese.
